scripts.prisma:generate: npx prisma generate --schema prisma/user/schema.prisma && npx prisma generate --schema prisma/manger/schema.prisma && npx prisma generate --schema prisma/PatientTest/schema.prisma
scripts.prisma:migrate: npx prisma db push --schema prisma/user/schema.prisma --url "file:./prisma/user.db" && npx prisma db push --schema prisma/manger/schema.prisma --url "file:./prisma/manger.db" && npx prisma db push --schema prisma/PatientTest/schema.prisma --url "file:./prisma/PatientTest.db"
scripts.prisma:build: npm run prisma:generate && npm run prisma:migrate
